title: psychotria heterochroa
intro: Psychotria heterochroa, also known as the 'Coral Tree' or 'Red Bead Tree', is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. This plant is prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties that have been traditionally used to treat a range of health issues, from fever and respiratory problems to skin conditions and wounds. The health benefits of Psychotria heterochroa include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce pain and inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties, making it a valuable addition to traditional medicine. In terms of herbal preparations, the plant's leaves can be made into a tea, which is often consumed to reap its medicinal benefits, and its extracts have also been used in topical applications to treat skin conditions.
